message:
refactor(interactive): revert enqueue_pi_event_current back to explicit enqueue_pi_event with Cx::for_request()

Restores the explicit Cx::for_request() parameter to enqueue_pi_event
calls throughout the interactive layer. The enqueue_pi_event_current
wrapper was removed in favor of the more explicit API that makes the
context parameter visible at every call site, improving traceability
for async event routing.

Affected paths: session lock/save failures, agent lock failures,
session switch cancellation, and conversation reset in interactive.rs,
agent.rs, and commands.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
